description: A lightweight armor fashioned from the feathers of a ravenous and cunning rocboc.
Light and breathable. The bare minimum to protect you from the elements.
A fashionable toga reinforced with bronze studs in key locations.
Layered comfortable garments that are great for adventures or a night on the town.
A pile of discolored and frayed wrappings worn by the acolytes of the Nameless God.
A light tunic interwoven with Submersian Coral.
A fashionable fish fit that shows just the right amount of skin. Perfect camo against the realm's least threatening creature.
This elegant gi provides the comfort and flexibility to kick ass, take names, and get home in time for dinner. Popular amongst masters of Togwan Do.
A suit made by the Super Blub Defender (SBD) Fan Club. This one represents the Red Defender, who is known for his bravery, virtue, and mastery of Togwan-do.
A suit made by the Super Blub Defender (SBD) Fan Club. This one represents the Pink Defender, who is known for her biting wit, nibbling charm, and chomping mastication.
A suit made by the Super Blub Defender (SBD) Fan Club. This one represents the Blue Defender, who is known for his honesty, compassion, and excellent taste in music.
A suit made by the Super Blub Defender (SBD) Fan Club. This one represents the Yellow Defender, who is known for her lucky dodges, uncanny lunges, and otherwordly Bloater cakes.
A suit made by the Super Blub Defender (SBD) Fan Club. This one represents the Black Defender, who is known for his firm handshake, next-level stealth, and unprompted backflips.
A suit made by the Super Blub Defender (SBD) Fan Club. This one represents the Green Defender, who is known for his boastfulness, gambling acumen, and violently unfunny dad jokes.
The mysterious Yellow Panther Clan lives and fights in the shadows. Don their ceremonial armor and join the movement.
A chef should always be prepared for furious fighting or fierce fileting. This is the perfect outfit for adventures both in and out of the kitchen.

When they're not sacrificing Heroes in a nonstop stream of dark rituals that push Gaia further and further towards an inescapable corruption, the Dark Summoner is looking fit and fancy-free in this sleek jumper wrap.
This champion gi provides the comfort and flexibility to kick ass, take names, and get home in time for dinner. Popular amongst masters of Togwan Do.
Brought to you by Tom Threads™, this dapper fishing vest is both fashionable and functional. It strikes fear in the hearts of bloaters everywhere.

Stay comfortable and organized with this stylish archivist tunic, meticulously crafted with padded lining for extended wear. Complete the ensemble with a pair of vibrant green gloves that will make any archival task seem trivial.
Bring the hype with every step you take in these immaculate duds.
Fashioned by Druids and beloved by outdoorsmen, these comfortable raiments truly embrace the elegance of the natural world.
Cold as ice and twice as nice, this frozen fish fit channels the least threatening creature in the frozen tundras of Crystalvale.
Don this tactical gardening gear to truly embody the qualities of a green thumb: patience, resolve, and the ability to squash errant blubs.
A musty Axolotl suit that has gained popularity amongst certain fringe groups. It is very... pink.
This lightweight toga fashioned by the gods transforms its wearer into an agile and extremely comfortable warrior.

Get the body you want without all the effort! This snug rubber muscle suit shows that you're not afraid of a little exercise, even if that exercise happens to be squeezing into a tight rubber muscle suit.
Don't even think about hiding these chic mining overalls underground! Show the surface world you mean business with a style they'll dig.
Skip the damp and the dark with this stylish frock modeled after the bright plumage of the infamous manshroom.
A fine armor fashioned from the feathers of a ravenous rocboc and cured leather.
A shabby leather vest with cloth accents for easy mobility.
A thick leather belt with bronze studs and plates to protect vital organs.
Studded leather armor that protects your body without slowing you down.
A gilded leather vest adorned with protective Submersian Coral.
Fashioned from the feathers and beak of a massive rocboc, this heavy armor allows its wearer to take a beating and keep on flapping.
A shabby (and heavy) plate draped over your torso. It appears to flex as you poke it.
Bronze armor that is molded to look like you have abs. Easier than the gym.
Imposing iron armor to protect you on the battlefield.
A rusty heap of platemail with the left arm missing. It serves as a poignant reminder of the unforgiving perils of the sea.
A golden breastplate covered in several layers of durable Submersian Coral.
